subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet sent down from the precincts of the Prison unto him who hath turned toward the Countenance, that he may inhale the fragrance of God, the All-Powerful, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح نزل من شطر السجن للذی اقبل الی الوجه لیجد عرف الله المقتدر العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @rejection, opposition and persecution
